project_root: Path | None = None,\n) -> tuple[Path, list[str]]:\n    """Soft-revoke active owned keys, clear export 
blobs, deactivate bindings.\n\n    Always writes backup first when *project_root* is provided.\n    Returns 
``(backup_path | pathlib sentinel, key_ids_revoked)``.\n    """\n    if confirm_token != CONFIRM_RESET_TOKEN:\n        
raise OwnerRecoveryError(\n            f\'Confirmation must be exactly "{CONFIRM_RESET_TOKEN}".\'\n        )\n\n    
backup_path: Path | None = None\n    snapshot = fetch_owner_snapshot(store, discord_user_id)\n    if project_root is 
not None:\n        backup_path = write_backup_file(project_root, discord_user_id, snapshot)\n\n    targets = 
list_active_owned_key_targets(store, discord_user_id)\n    if not targets:\n        raise OwnerRecoveryError("No 
active owned keys to reset.")\n\n    revoked: list[str] = []\n    if isinstance(store, LocalJsonLicenseStore):\n       
 db = store._load()\n        for t in targets:\n            tid = t["key_id"]\n            rec = db["keys"].get(tid)\n 
           if not rec or rec.get("owner_discord_id") != discord_user_id:\n                continue\n            
rec["status"] = "revoked"\n            rec["key_ciphertext"] = ""\n            rec["key_export_available"] = False\n   
         rec["updated_at"] = _utc_now()\n            db["keys"][tid] = rec\n            bind = 
db.setdefault("bindings", {}).get(tid)\n            if bind:\n                bind["is_active"] = False\n              
  db["bindings"][tid] = bind\n            revoked.append(tid)\n        store._save(db)\n        
store.audit_admin_action(\n            actor_label,\n            "owner_recovery_reset_unrecoverable",\n            
target_type="user",\n            target_id=discord_user_id[:12],\n            metadata={"keys_revoked": [x[:8] for x 
in revoked]},\n        )\n        return backup_path or Path("."), revoked\n\n    if isinstance(store, 
SupabaseLicenseStore):\n        client = store._client\n        mig_ok, _ = verify_supabase_export_columns(client)\n   
     for t in targets:\n            tid = t["key_id"]\n            upd: dict[str, Any] = {"status": "revoked"}\n       
     if mig_ok:\n                upd["key_ciphertext"] = None\n                upd["key_export_available"] = False\n   
         client.table("license_keys").update(upd).eq("id", tid).eq(\n                "owner_discord_id", 
discord_user_id\n            ).execute()\n            client.table("device_bindings").update({"is_active": 
False}).eq(\n                "key_id", tid\n            ).execute()\n            revoked.append(tid)\n        
store.audit_admin_action(\n            actor_label,\n            "owner_recovery_reset_unrecoverable",\n            
target_type="user",\n            target_id=discord_user_id[:12],\n            metadata={"keys_revoked": [x[:8] for x 
in revoked]},\n        )\n        return backup_path or Path("."), revoked\n\n    raise 
OwnerRecoveryError("Unsupported store")\n\n\ndef inspect_summary(store: BaseLicenseStore, discord_user_id: str) -> 
dict[str, Any]:\n    """Structured inspect payload for CLI output."""\n    from . import license_key_export as lke\n\n 
   targets = list_active_owned_key_targets(store, discord_user_id)\n    snap = fetch_owner_snapshot(store, 
discord_user_id)\n    export_secret_ok = lke.is_export_secret_configured()\n    mig_ok = True\n    mig_detail = "n/a 
(local store)"\n    if isinstance(store, SupabaseLicenseStore):\n        mig_ok, mig_detail = 
verify_supabase_export_columns(store._client)\n\n    summaries = []\n    for t in targets:\n        tid = 
t["key_id"]\n        masked = f"{t.get(\'prefix\', \'?\')}...{t.get(\'suffix\', \'?\')}"\n        raw_ct = ""\n        
bind_active = False\n        if isinstance(store, LocalJsonLicenseStore):\n            db = store._load()\n            
raw_ct = (db.get("keys", {}).get(tid, {}).get("key_ciphertext") or "").strip()\n            bind_active = 
bool(db.get("bindings", {}).get(tid, {}).get("is_active"))\n        elif isinstance(store, SupabaseLicenseStore):\n    
        if mig_ok:\n                try:\n                    res = (\n                        
store._client.table("license_keys")\n                        .select("key_ciphertext")\n                        
.eq("id", tid)\n                        .limit(1)\n                        .execute()\n                    )\n         
           if res.data:\n                        raw_ct = (res.data[0].get("key_ciphertext") or "").strip()\n          
      except Exception:\n                    raw_ct = ""\n            else:\n                raw_ct = ""\n            
for b in snap.get("device_bindings", []):\n                if b.get("key_id") == tid:\n                    bind_active 
= bool(b.get("is_active"))\n                    break\n\n        ct_present = bool(raw_ct)\n        recoverable = 
bool(raw_ct and lke.decrypt_license_key_ciphertext(raw_ct))\n\n        summaries.append({\n            
"key_id_prefix": tid[:16],\n            "masked_reference": masked,\n            "status": t.get("status"),\n          
  "active_binding": bind_active,\n            "ciphertext_present": ct_present,\n            
"full_key_recoverable_with_current_secret": recoverable,\n        })\n\n    return {\n        "discord_user_id": 
discord_user_id,\n        "active_owned_key_count": len(targets),\n        "export_secret_configured": 
export_secret_ok,\n        "migration_002_export_columns_ok": mig_ok,\n        "migration_002_detail": mig_detail,\n   
     "keys": summaries,\n    }\n\n"""DENG Tool: Rejoin ù Discord license panel builders.\n\nThis module provides 
*reusable builders* for the Discord license key panel.\nIt is NOT a runtime bot ù it has no discord.py/disnake client, 
no event loop,\nand no network calls.  Wire these embed/button specs into your existing Discord\nbot cog or command 
tree.\n\nPanel 
life-cycle\n\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n1. Admin 
runs /license_panel set_channel #channel\n2. Admin runs /license_panel post           \u2192 creates a persistent 
embed message\n3. Members click buttons (ephemeral flows)\n4. Admin runs /license_panel refresh        \u2192 edits 
the embed in place\n5. Admin runs /license_panel clear          \u2192 removes panel config (not the 
message)\n\nButton custom IDs (use these as constants in your button handler):\n    BUTTON_GENERATE   = 
"license_panel:generate"\n    BUTTON_RESET_HWID = "license_panel:reset_hwid"\n    BUTTON_REDEEM     = 
"license_panel:redeem"\n    BUTTON_KEY_STATS  = "license_panel:key_stats"\n    BUTTON_SELECT_VERSION = 
"license_panel:select_version"\n\nAll button response flows are EPHEMERAL ù only the clicking user sees the 
result.\n\nRequired bot permissions: Send Messages, Embed Links, Read Message History.\n"""\n\nfrom __future__ import 
annotations\n\nfrom typing import Any\n\n\ndef format_copy_license_key_content(full_key: str) -> str:\n    """First 
line labels; second line is backticks-only for easy Discord copying."""\n    key = (full_key or "").strip()\n    
return f"Copy License Key:\\n`{key}`"\n\n\ndef format_copy_license_keys_lines(keys: list[str]) -> str:\n    """One or 
many keys: plain lines with minimal extra text inside copy lines."""\n    cleaned = [k.strip() for k in keys if 
k.strip()]\n    if not cleaned:\n        return ""\n    if len(cleaned) == 1:\n        return 
format_copy_license_key_content(cleaned[0])\n    lines = ["Copy License Keys:"]\n    for i, k in enumerate(cleaned, 
start=1):\n        lines.append(f"{i}. `{k}`")\n    return "\\n".join(lines)\n\n\n# \u2500\u2500 Button custom ID 
constants \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\
u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500
\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nBUTTON_GENERATE   = 
"license_panel:generate"\nBUTTON_RESET_HWID = "license_panel:reset_hwid"\nBUTTON_REDEEM     =

       = "clear"\nSLASH_ADMIN_STATUS  = "admin_status"\n\n\n# \u2500\u2500 Panel embed builder \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500

00\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ndef build_panel_embed() -> dict[str, 
Any]:\n    """Return a Discord embed payload dict for the persistent license panel.\n\n    The returned structure is 
framework-agnostic JSON.  Convert it to your\n    discord.py / disnake Embed with

 ò Title  : "DENG Tool: Rejoin Panel"\n    ò Color  : 0x2F80ED (brand blue)\n    ò Fields : 5 instruction cards ù 
Generate, Reset HWID, Redeem, Key Stats, Select Version\n    ò Footer : "DENG Tool ╖ All responses are private"\n

           "Generate or redeem your license key, reset your device binding, "\n            "and choose which DENG 
Tool: Rejoin version to install.\\n"\n            "All key-related responses are **private** ù only you will see 
them."\n        ),\n        "fields": [\n            {\n                "name": "\\U0001f511 Generate Key",\n          
      "value": (\n                    "Create a new license key.\\n"\n                    "Each account is allowed **1 
key** by default.\\n"\n                    "Store it somewhere safe ù it is only shown once."\n                ),\n    
            "inline": True,\n            },\n            {\n                "name": "\\u267b\\ufe0f Reset HWID",\n     
           "value": (\n                    "Unbind your current device so you can move your key to a new

minutes after your last session."\n                ),\n                "inline": True,\n            },\n

an existing key to your Discord account.\\n"\n                    "Paste the full key (e.g. 
`DENG-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX`)."\n                ),\n                "inline": True,\n            },\n            {\n

private"},\n        "timestamp": None,   # Caller should set this to current UTC ISO string\n    }\n\n\ndef

   seconds = elapsed_seconds % 60\n    elapsed_str = f"{minutes}m {seconds}s" if minutes else f"{seconds}s"\n

     },\n    }\n\n\ndef build_redeem_error_response(reason: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    """Ephemeral embed when key

build_key_list_response(key_records: list[dict]) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    """Ephemeral response listing a user\'s 
active keys (for /license_panel status)."""\n    copy_keys: list[str] = []\n    for rec in key_records:\n        fk = 
rec.get("full_key_plaintext")\n        if fk:\n            copy_keys.append(str(fk).strip())\n\n    content = 
format_copy_license_keys_lines(copy_keys) if copy_keys else ""\n\n    if not key_records:\n        description = "You 
have no license keys yet. Click **Generate Key** to create one."\n    else:\n        lines: list[str] = []\n        
for rec in key_records:\n            status_icon = {\n                "active": "\\U0001f7e2",\n                
"expired": "\\U0001f534",\n                "revoked": "\\u26ab",\n            }.get(rec.get("status", ""), 
"\\u26aa")\n            device = rec.get("bound_device") or "(unbound)"\n            last_seen = 
rec.get("last_seen_at")\n            last_seen_str = f"\\n   \\u23f1 Last seen: `{last_seen}`" if last_seen else ""\n  
          bound_icon = "\\U0001f4f1" if device != "(unbound)" else "\\U0001f534"\n            full = 
rec.get("full_key_plaintext")\n            if full:\n                key_block = "**Key:** copy block above (full key 
not repeated here)."\n            else:\n                ref = rec.get("masked_key", "???")\n                key_block 
= (\n                    "**Full key is not recoverable for copying from the server.** "\n                    "If this 
is an older key, export storage may not have been enabled when it was created. "\n                    f"Reference only 
(not a complete key): **{ref}**\\n"\n                    "Use **Recover Full Key** in Key Stats if you still have the 
key text."\n                )\n            lines.append(\n                f"{status_icon} {key_block}\\n"\n            
    f"   ù {rec.get(\'status\', \'unknown\')}\\n"\n                f"   {bound_icon} Device: 
{device}{last_seen_str}"\n            )\n        description = "\\n\\n".join(lines)\n    out: dict[str, Any] = {\n     
   "ephemeral": True,\n        "embed": {\n            "title": "\\U0001f4cb Your License Keys",\n            "color": 
0x2F80ED,\n            "description": description,\n            "footer": {"text": "Use Reset HWID to unbind a device 
when needed."},\n        },\n    }\n    if content:\n        out["content"] = content\n    return out\n\n\ndef 
build_reset_no_binding_response() -> dict[str, Any]:\n    """Ephemeral embed when Reset HWID is attempted but no

   message: str | None = None,\n    *,\n    export_backfilled: bool = False,\n    copyable_key: str | None = None,\n) 
-> dict[str, Any]:\n    """Ephemeral embed when a user tries to redeem their own already-attached key."""\n    if 
copyable_key:\n        desc = "This key is already attached to your account."\n        if export_backfilled:\n         
   desc += "\\n\\n**Full key export has been enabled** for this key in the database."\n    elif export_backfilled:\n   
     desc = (\n            (message or "This key is already attached to your account.")\n            + "\\n\\n**Full 
key export has been enabled** for this key."\n        )\n    else:\n        desc = message or "This key is already 
attached to your account."\n    out: dict[str, Any] = {\n        "ephemeral": True,\n        "embed": {\n            
"title": "\\u2139\\ufe0f Key Already Attached",\n            "color": 0x2F80ED,\n            "description": desc,\n    
    },\n    }\n    if copyable_key:\n        out["content"] = format_copy_license_key_content(copyable_key)\n    
return out\n\n\ndef build_not_owner_response() -> dict[str, Any]:\n    """Ephemeral embed when a non-owner tries an 
admin-only panel operation."""\n    return {\n        "ephemeral": True,\n        "embed": {\n            "title": 
"\\U0001f6ab Unauthorized",\n            "color": 0xE74C3C,\n            "description": "You do not have permission to 
manage the license panel.",\n        },\n    }\n\n\ndef build_reset_selector_embed(keys_with_state: list[dict]) -> 
dict[str, Any]:\n    """Ephemeral embed shown when the user opens the HWID reset key selector.\n\n    keys_with_state: 
list of dicts from store.list_user_keys_with_binding_state().\n    Legend (above the list): \U0001f7e2 no device 
linked, \U0001f7e1 bound to a device.\n    Each row is numbered; full key in backticks when recoverable, else masked 
reference.\n    """\n    legend = "\\U0001f7e2 No device linked\\n\\U0001f7e1 Bound to a device"\n    lines: list[str] 
= []\n    for i, k in enumerate(keys_with_state, start=1):\n        bound = bool(k.get("active_binding"))\n        # 
\U0001f7e2 = no device linked, \U0001f7e1 = bound to a device\n        icon = "\\U0001f7e1" if bound else 
"\\U0001f7e2"\n        fk = k.get("full_key_plaintext")\n        mk = k.get("masked_key", "???")\n        if fk:\n     
       key_disp = f"`{fk}`"\n        else:\n            key_disp = f"**{mk}** (reference only)"\n        if bound:\n   
         device_name = (k.get("device_model") or k.get("device_label") or "").strip()\n            suffix = f"Bound to 
{device_name}" if device_name else "Bound to a device"\n        else:\n            suffix = "No device linked"\n       
 lines.append(f"{i}. {icon} {key_disp} ù {suffix}")\n    key_list = "\\n".join(lines)\n    description = (\n        
"Select which key to reset from the dropdown below, "\n        "then click **Confirm Reset**.\\n\\n"\n        
f"{legend}\\n\\n"\n        f"{key_list}"\n    )\n    return {\n        "ephemeral": True,\n        "embed": {\n        
    "title": "\\u267b\\ufe0f Reset HWID \\u2014 Select Key",\n            "color": 0x2F80ED,\n            
"description": description,\n            "footer": {"text": "DENG Tool \\u00b7 Limited to 5 resets per 24 hours per 
key"},\n        },\n    }\n\n\ndef build_reset_no_keys_response() -> dict[str, Any]:\n    """Ephemeral embed when the 
user has no (non-revoked) license keys to reset."""\n    return {\n        "ephemeral": True,\n        "embed": {\n    
        "title": "\\u274c No Keys Found",\n            "color": 0xE74C3C,\n            "description": (\n              
  "You have no license keys to reset.\\n"\n                "Use **Generate Key** to create one."\n            ),\n     
   },\n    }\n\n\ndef build_reset_mixed_summary_embed(results: list[dict]) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    """Ephemeral embed 
listing per-key HWID reset outcomes.\n\n    Each result dict: {display_key (str), success (bool), message (str)}.\n    
"""\n    lines: list[str] = []\n    for r in results:\n        icon = "\\u2705" if r.get("success") else "\\u274c"  # 
\u2705 / \u274c\n        dk = r.get("display_key") or r.get("masked_key", "???")\n        lines.append(f"{icon} `{dk}` 
\\u2014 {r.get(\'message\', \'\')}")\n    description = "\\n".join(lines) if lines else "No keys were processed."\n    
all_ok = bool(results) and all(r.get("success") for r in results)\n    none_ok = bool(results) and not 
any(r.get("success") for r in results)\n    color = 0x27AE60 if all_ok else (0xE74C3C if none_ok else 0xF39C12)\n    
return {\n        "ephemeral": True,\n        "embed": {\n            "title": "\\u267b\\ufe0f HWID Reset Results",\n  
          "color": color,\n            "description": description,\n        },\n    }\n\n\n# \u2500\u2500 Admin 
command spec (documentation / registration helper) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u
2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ndef get_slash_command_specs() -> list[dict[str, Any]]:\n    
"""Return a list of slash command spec dicts for /license_panel sub-commands.\n\n    Use this to generate discord.py

       "options": [\n                {"name": "channel", "description": "Target text channel", "required": True,

    "owner_only": True,\n            "options": [],\n        },\n        {\n            "group": SLASH_GROUP,\n        
    "name": SLASH_REFRESH,\n            "description": "Edit the existing panel message in place (update embed

          "group": SLASH_GROUP,\n            "name": SLASH_ADMIN_STATUS,\n            "description": "Show panel

]\n\n"""DENG Tool: Rejoin ù License store abstraction.\n\nArchitecture\n\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u250
0\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\nBaseLicenseStore defines the interface.\nLocalJsonLicenseStore implements it using a local 
JSON file (dev / tests).\nSupabaseLicenseStore is planned for future remote integration; see docs.\n\nData 
model\n\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\nò 1 Discord user   = up to max_keys license keys 
(default 1).\nò 1 license key    = 1 active device binding.\nò Device identity  = hash of install_id (privacy-safe; no 
IMEI).\nò HWID reset limit = 5 per 24 hours per key.\nò Active key guard = warn/block reset if last heartbeat < 5 
minutes ago.\n\nCheck result codes\n\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u250
0\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\nactive | expired | revoked | wrong_device | key_not_redeemed | not_found |\ninactive | 
missing_key | server_unavailable\n"""\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport json\nimport secrets\nimport 
time\nfrom abc import ABC, abstractmethod\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom 
typing import Any\n\nfrom .constants import APP_HOME\nfrom .license import generate_license_key, hash_license_key, 
normalize_license_key, LicenseKeyError\n\n# \u2500\u2500 Public constants \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2
500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u
2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\
u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nSTORE_PATH = APP_HOME / 
"license_store.json"\n\nRESULT_ACTIVE              = "active"\nRESULT_EXPIRED             = "expired"\nRESULT_REVOKED  
           = "revoked"\nRESULT_WRONG_DEVICE        = "wrong_device"\nRESULT_KEY_NOT_REDEEMED    = 
"key_not_redeemed"\nRESULT_NOT_FOUND           = "not_found"\nRESULT_INACTIVE            = 
"inactive"\nRESULT_MISSING_KEY         = "missing_key"\nRESULT_SERVER_UNAVAILABLE  = 
"server_unavailable"\n\nMAX_HWID_RESETS_PER_24H    = 5\nACTIVE_HEARTBEAT_WINDOW_S  = 300          # 5 
minutes\nDEFAULT_MAX_KEYS            = 1\nGENERATION_COOLDOWN_SECONDS = 60          # minimum seconds between key 
generations\nUNREDEEMED_KEY_EXPIRY_SECONDS = 86400    # 24 hours ù unredeemed keys expire\n\n\n# \u2500\u2500 Custom 
exceptions \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500
\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u250
0\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u25
00\n\nclass StoreError(Exception):\n    """Base class for license store errors."""\n\nclass 
UserLimitError(StoreError):\n    """User has reached their license key limit."""\n\nclass 
KeyNotFoundError(StoreError):\n    """Key does not exist in the store."""\n\nclass KeyOwnershipError(StoreError):\n    
"""Key belongs to a different Discord user."""\n\nclass KeyAlreadySelfOwned(StoreError):\n    """Key is already 
attached to the requesting Discord user."""\n\n    def __init__(self, message: str, *, export_backfilled: bool = 
False) -> None:\n        super().__init__(message)\n        self.export_backfilled = export_backfilled\n\n\nclass 
ExportStorageUnavailable(StoreError):\n    """Cannot persist encrypted full keys (missing secret, crypto, or DB 
columns)."""\n\n\nclass NoActiveBindingError(StoreError):\n    """No active device binding exists for this key; 
nothing to reset."""\n\nclass ResetLimitError(StoreError):\n    """HWID reset limit exceeded (5 per 24 
hours)."""\n\nclass ActiveKeyWarning(StoreError):\n    """Key heartbeat was recently active; recommend waiting before 
reset."""\n\nclass GenerationCooldownError(StoreError):\n    """User must wait before generating another key (1-minute 
cooldown)."""\n\n    def __init__(self, message: str, *, remaining_seconds: int) -> None:\n        
super().__init__(message)\n        self.remaining_seconds = remaining_seconds\n\nclass ExpiredKeyError(StoreError):\n  
  """Key has expired (unredeemed for more than 24 hours)."""\n\n\n# \u2500\u2500 Helpers \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500
\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u250
0\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u25
00\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2
500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ndef _utc_now() -> str:\n    return 
datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat()\n\n\ndef _seconds_since(iso_str: str | None) -> float | 
None:\n    if not iso_str:\n        return None\n    try:\n        dt = datetime.fromisoformat(iso_str)\n        if 
dt.tzinfo is None:\n            dt = dt.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)\n        return max(0.0, 
(datetime.now(timezone.utc) - dt).total_seconds())\n    except (ValueError, TypeError):\n        return None\n\n\n# 
\u2500\u2500 Base interface \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\
u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500
\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u250
0\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nclass BaseLicenseStore(ABC):\n    """Interface that all license store 
implementations must satisfy."""\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def get_or_create_user(\n        self, discord_user_id: 
str, discord_username: str | None = None\n    ) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        """Return existing user record or create 
one.  Returns user dict."""\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def get_user_by_discord_id(self, discord_user_id: str) -> 
dict[str, Any] | None:\n        """Return user dict or None."""\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def 
set_user_max_keys(self, discord_user_id: str, max_keys: int) -> None:\n        """Set the maximum number of keys a 
user may own."""\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def count_user_keys(self, discord_user_id: str) -> int:\n        """Count 
the active (non-revoked) keys owned by a user."""\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def create_key_for_user(\n        self, 
discord_user_id: str, created_by: str | None = None\n    ) -> str:\n        """Generate and store a new key for the 
user.\n        Returns the FULL key (only time it is returned).\n        Raises UserLimitError if the user is at their 
limit.\n        """\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def redeem_key_for_user(self, discord_user_id: str, raw_key: str) -> 
str:\n        """Attach an existing key to a Discord user.\n        Returns the normalized **full** key on success 
(for copy).\n        Raises KeyNotFoundError, KeyOwnershipError, or UserLimitError.\n        """\n\n    
@abstractmethod\n    def recover_key_export_for_user(self, discord_user_id: str, raw_key: str) -> str:\n        
"""Store ciphertext for a key the user owns when export data is missing.\n\n        Returns ``\\"stored\\"`` after 
writing ciphertext, or ``\\"already_exportable\\"``\n        when a working ciphertext already exists. Never logs the 
plaintext key.\n\n        Raises:\n            ExportStorageUnavailable: encryption unavailable or not configured.\n   
         KeyNotFoundError: invalid key string or no such key.\n            KeyOwnershipError: key belongs to someone 
else.\n        """\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def list_user_keys(self, discord_user_id: str) -> list[dict[str, 
Any]]:\n        """Return a list of key summary dicts for a user.\n        Each dict: {id, masked_key, 
full_key_plaintext (optional), status, plan,\n        bound_device, created_at}\n        """\n\n    @abstractmethod\n  
  def reset_hwid(self, discord_user_id: str, key_id: str) -> None:\n        """Clear the active device binding for a 
key.\n        Raises NoActiveBindingError if no active binding exists (nothing to reset).\n        Raises 
ResetLimitError if >= 5 resets in last 24 h.\n        Raises ActiveKeyWarning if last heartbeat < 5 minutes ago.\n     
   Raises KeyNotFoundError if key does not exist.\n        """\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def 
get_reset_count_24h(self, key_id: str) -> int:\n        """Number of HWID resets in the last 24 hours for a 
key."""\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def get_last_seen_at(self, key_id: str) -> str | None:\n        """ISO timestamp 
of the last heartbeat for a key, or None."""\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def bind_or_check_device(\n        self,\n    
    raw_key: str,\n        install_id_hash: str,\n        device_model: str,\n        app_version: str,\n        
device_label: str = "",\n    ) -> str:\n        """Bind or verify a device against a key.\n        Returns a RESULT_* 
string.\n        Never raises; errors are returned as result codes.\n        """\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def 
check_install_download_access(self, raw_key: str, install_id_hash: str) -> str:\n        """Authorize protected 
artifact download during Termux bootstrap.\n\n        Must **not** create or update device bindings (binding stays on 
first tool run).\n\n        If the key has an **active** binding and *install_id_hash* is empty or does not\n        
match the stored hash, returns ``wrong_device`` so bound keys cannot be used to\n        fetch artifacts from a fresh 
Termux without proving the same device (use Reset HWID).\n        """\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def 
get_owner_discord_id_for_license_key(self, raw_key: str) -> str | None:\n        """Return the redeemed owner\'s 
Discord user ID for *raw_key*, or None."""\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def log_license_check(self, **kwargs: Any) -> 
None:\n        """Record a license check event (for audit / rate-limit analysis)."""\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def 
save_panel_config(\n        self, guild_id: str, channel_id: str, message_id: str, updated_by: str\n    ) -> None:\n   
     """Persist the Discord panel channel + message ID for a guild."""\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def 
get_panel_config(self, guild_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:\n        """Return panel config dict {channel_id, 
message_id, updated_by, updated_at} or None."""\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def clear_panel_config(self, guild_id: 
str) -> None:\n        """Remove the saved panel config (does NOT delete keys)."""\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def 
list_user_keys_with_binding_state(\n        self, discord_user_id: str\n    ) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:\n        
"""Return key dicts with binding state info for the HWID reset selector.\n\n        Each dict contains:\n          
key_id, masked_key, full_key_plaintext (optional), status,\n          active_binding (bool), device_model, 
device_label, last_seen_at,\n          reset_count_24h, can_reset (bool), reason_if_not_resettable (str | None).\n\n   
     Revoked keys are excluded from the result.\n        """\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def 
list_user_keys_for_stats(self, discord_user_id: str) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:\n        """Rows for Key Stats / 
download. Never includes key hash/id.\n\n        Each dict may include:\n          masked_key, full_key_plaintext 
(optional), has_stored_ciphertext,\n          export_storage_configured, license_status, used, device_display,\n       
   last_seen_at, created_at, plan, reset_count_24h\n        """\n\n    def get_user_key_export_rows(self, 
discord_user_id: str) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:\n        """Alias for the same data used by Download Keys (all 
pages)."""\n        return self.list_user_keys_for_stats(discord_user_id)\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def 
audit_admin_action(\n        self,\n        actor_discord_user_id: str,\n        action: str,\n        *,\n        
target_type: str | None = None,\n        target_id: str | None = None,\n        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = 
None,\n    ) -> None:\n        """Record an admin action in the audit log."""\n\n    def save_license_log_config(\n    
    self, guild_id: str, channel_id: str, updated_by: str\n    ) -> None:\n        """Persist the channel ID for 
license event logs in a guild."""\n\n    def get_license_log_config(self, guild_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:\n   
     """Return license log config dict or None."""\n        return None\n\n    def clear_license_log_config(self, 
guild_id: str) -> None:\n        """Remove the license log channel config for a guild."""\n\n    def 
get_license_stats_for_discord_user(\n        self, discord_user_id: str\n    ) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        """Return 
license stats dict for a Discord user.\n\n        Subclasses should override this for efficient DB-backed stats.\n     
   Base default returns zeroed stats.\n        """\n        return {\n            "discord_user_id": 
discord_user_id,\n            "key_generated_count": 0,\n            "key_redeemed_count": 0,\n            
"unbound_key_count": 0,\n            "bound_key_count": 0,\n            "reset_hwid_count": 0,\n            
"key_executed_count": 0,\n        }\n\n    def record_key_execution(\n        self,\n        key_id: str,\n        
owner_discord_id: str,\n        version: str,\n        channel: str,\n        *,\n        is_public_release: bool,\n   
 ) -> None:\n        """Record one public-release tool execution. No-op by default."""\n\n\n# \u2500\u2500 Local JSON 
implementation (dev / tests) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500
\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u250
0\u2500\n\nclass LocalJsonLicenseStore(BaseLicenseStore):\n    """File-backed license store that uses a local JSON 
file.\n\n    Suitable for:\n    - Offline development\n    - Automated tests (pass a temp path)\n    - Environments 
without Supabase access\n\n    Thread-safety: single-file; not concurrent-safe.  Fine for tests and CLI.\n    """\n\n  
  def __init__(self, path: Path | None = None) -> None:\n        self._path = path or STORE_PATH\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 
I/O \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\
u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500
\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u250
0\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n    def _load(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        
self._path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n        if not self._path.exists():\n            return 
self._empty_db()\n        try:\n            return json.loads(self._path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))\n        except 
(OSError, json.JSONDecodeError):\n            return self._empty_db()\n\n    def _save(self, db: dict[str, Any]) -> 
None:\n        self._path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n        self._path.write_text(\n            
json.dumps(db, indent=2, sort_keys=True) + "\\n", encoding="utf-8"\n        )\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def 
_empty_db() -> dict[str, Any]:\n        return {\n            "users": {},\n            "keys": {},\n            
"bindings": {},\n            "reset_logs": [],\n            "check_logs": [],\n            "panel_configs": {},\n      
      "license_log_configs": {},\n            "audit_logs": [],\n        }\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 User helpers \u2500\u2
500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u
2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\
u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n    def 
get_or_create_user(\n        self, discord_user_id: str, discord_username: str | None = None\n    ) -> dict[str, 
Any]:\n        db = self._load()\n        if discord_user_id not in db["users"]:\n            
db["users"][discord_user_id] = {\n                "discord_username": discord_username or "",\n                
"max_keys": DEFAULT_MAX_KEYS,\n                "is_owner": False,\n                "is_blocked": False,\n              
  "last_key_generated_at": None,\n                "created_at": _utc_now(),\n                "updated_at": 
_utc_now(),\n            }\n            self._save(db)\n        else:\n            changed = False\n            if 
discord_username and discord_username != db["users"][discord_user_id].get("discord_username"):\n                
db["users"][discord_user_id]["discord_username"] = discord_username\n                
db["users"][discord_user_id]["updated_at"] = _utc_now()\n                changed = True\n            if 
"last_key_generated_at" not in db["users"][discord_user_id]:\n                
db["users"][discord_user_id]["last_key_generated_at"] = None\n                changed = True\n            if 
changed:\n                self._save(db)\n        return dict(db["users"][discord_user_id])\n\n    def 
get_user_by_discord_id(self, discord_user_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:\n        db = self._load()\n        user 
= db["users"].get(discord_user_id)\n        return dict(user) if user else None\n\n    def set_user_max_keys(self, 
discord_user_id: str, max_keys: int) -> None:\n        db = self._load()\n        if discord_user_id not in 
db["users"]:\n            raise KeyNotFoundError(f"User not found: {discord_user_id}")\n        
db["users"][discord_user_id]["max_keys"] = max(1, int(max_keys))\n        db["users"][discord_user_id]["updated_at"] = 
_utc_now()\n        self._save(db)\n\n    def count_user_keys(self, discord_user_id: str) -> int:\n        db = 
self._load()\n        return sum(\n            1 for k in db["keys"].values()\n            if 
k.get("owner_discord_id") == discord_user_id\n            and k.get("status") != "revoked"\n        )\n\n    # 
\u2500\u2500 Key creation and redemption \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500
\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u250
0\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n    def create_key_for_user(\n        self, 
discord_user_id: str, created_by: str | None = None\n    ) -> str:\n        user = 
self.get_or_create_user(discord_user_id)\n        if user.get("is_blocked"):\n            raise UserLimitError("This 
account is blocked from generating keys.")\n\n        # Cooldown: first generation has no cooldown; subsequent 
generations\n        # require a 60-second wait (DB-backed, survives restarts).\n        last_gen = 
user.get("last_key_generated_at")\n        if last_gen:\n            elapsed = _seconds_since(last_gen)\n            
if elapsed is not None and elapsed < GENERATION_COOLDOWN_SECONDS:\n                remaining = 
int(GENERATION_COOLDOWN_SECONDS - elapsed) + 1\n                raise GenerationCooldownError(\n                    
f"Please wait {remaining} seconds before generating another key.",\n                    remaining_seconds=remaining,\n 
               )\n\n        # Lazy-expire unredeemed generated keys older than 24 hours so they\n        # don\'t 
silently accumulate in the stats as "active".\n        self._expire_unredeemed_keys(discord_user_id)\n\n        
raw_key = generate_license_key()\n        key_hash = hash_license_key(raw_key)\n        parts = raw_key.split("-")\n   
     from . import license_key_export as lke\n\n        ciphertext = lke.encrypt_license_key_plaintext(raw_key)\n      
  now = _utc_now()\n        db = self._load()\n        db["keys"][key_hash] = {\n            "id": key_hash,\n         
   "prefix": f"{parts[0]}-{parts[1]}",\n            "suffix": parts[-1],\n            "owner_discord_id": 
discord_user_id,\n            "status": "active",\n            "plan": "standard",\n            "expires_at": None,\n  
          "redeemed_at": None,\n            "created_by": created_by or discord_user_id,\n            "created_at": 
now,\n            "updated_at": now,\n            "key_ciphertext": ciphertext,\n            "key_export_available": 
bool(ciphertext),\n        }\n        db["users"][discord_user_id]["last_key_generated_at"] = now\n        
db["users"][discord_user_id]["updated_at"] = now\n        self._save(db)\n        self.audit_admin_action(\n           
 created_by or discord_user_id,\n            "create_key",\n            target_type="key",\n            
target_id=key_hash[:8],\n            metadata={"owner": discord_user_id},\n        )\n        # Return the FULL key ù 
this is the only time it is returned\n        return raw_key\n\n    def _expire_unredeemed_keys(self, discord_user_id: 
str) -> int:\n        """Mark expired unredeemed keys as \'expired\' status.\n\n        A key is expired-unredeemed 
when: it belongs to the user, has no\n        ``redeemed_at`` timestamp, has no device binding, and is older than\n    
    ``UNREDEEMED_KEY_EXPIRY_SECONDS``.  Modifies the DB in-place.\n        Returns the number of keys expired.\n       
 """\n        db = self._load()\n        expired_count = 0\n        for key_hash, record in db["keys"].items():\n      
      if record.get("owner_discord_id") != discord_user_id:\n                continue\n            if 
record.get("status") in ("revoked", "expired"):\n                continue\n            if record.get("redeemed_at"):\n 
               continue\n            binding = db.get("bindings", {}).get(key_hash, {})\n            if 
binding.get("install_id_hash"):\n                continue\n            created = record.get("created_at")\n            
if not created:\n                continue\n            age = _seconds_since(created)\n            if age is not None 
and age > UNREDEEMED_KEY_EXPIRY_SECONDS:\n                db["keys"][key_hash]["status"] = "expired"\n                
db["keys"][key_hash]["updated_at"] = _utc_now()\n                expired_count += 1\n        if expired_count:\n       
     self._save(db)\n        return expired_count\n\n    def redeem_key_for_user(self, discord_user_id: str, raw_key: 
str) -> str:\n        try:\n            normalized = normalize_license_key(raw_key)\n        except LicenseKeyError as 
exc:\n            raise KeyNotFoundError(str(exc)) from exc\n        key_hash = hash_license_key(normalized)\n        
db = self._load()\n        key_record = db["keys"].get(key_hash)\n        if not key_record:\n            raise 
KeyNotFoundError("Key not found. Check the key and try again.")\n        if key_record.get("status") == "revoked":\n   
         raise KeyNotFoundError("This key has been revoked.")\n        if key_record.get("status") == "expired":\n     
       raise ExpiredKeyError("This key has expired (unredeemed for more than 24 hours).")\n\n        owner = 
key_record.get("owner_discord_id")\n        if owner == discord_user_id:\n            from . import license_key_export 
as lke\n\n            backfilled = False\n            ct = lke.encrypt_license_key_plaintext(normalized)\n            
if ct:\n                existing_ct = (key_record.get("key_ciphertext") or "").strip()\n                plain = (\n    
                lke.decrypt_license_key_ciphertext(existing_ct)\n                    if existing_ct\n                  
  else None\n                )\n                if not existing_ct or not plain:\n                    
key_record["key_ciphertext"] = ct\n                    key_record["key_export_available"] = True\n                    
key_record["updated_at"] = _utc_now()\n                    db["keys"][key_hash] = key_record\n                    
self._save(db)\n                    backfilled = True\n            raise KeyAlreadySelfOwned(\n                "This 
key is already attached to your account.",\n                export_backfilled=backfilled,\n            )\n        if 
owner and owner != discord_user_id:\n            raise KeyOwnershipError("This key belongs to another user.")\n\n      
  # Unowned key: check expiry before attaching.\n        # An unowned key older than 24h with no prior binding is 
expired.\n        if not key_record.get("redeemed_at"):\n            binding = db.get("bindings", {}).get(key_hash, 
{})\n            if not binding.get("install_id_hash"):\n                created = key_record.get("created_at")\n      
          if created:\n                    age = _seconds_since(created)\n                    if age is not None and 
age > UNREDEEMED_KEY_EXPIRY_SECONDS:\n                        raise ExpiredKeyError(\n                            
"This key has expired (not claimed within 24 hours of creation)."\n                        )\n\n        
self.get_or_create_user(discord_user_id)\n        now = _utc_now()\n        db["keys"][key_hash]["owner_discord_id"] = 
discord_user_id\n        db["keys"][key_hash]["redeemed_at"] = now\n        db["keys"][key_hash]["updated_at"] = now\n 
       self._save(db)\n        self.audit_admin_action(discord_user_id, "redeem_key", target_type="key", 
target_id=key_hash[:8])\n        return normalized\n\n    def list_user_keys(self, discord_user_id: str) -> 
list[dict[str, Any]]:\n        from . import license_key_export as lke\n\n        db = self._load()\n        result: 
list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n        for key_hash, record in db["keys"].items():\n            if 
record.get("owner_discord_id") != discord_user_id:\n                continue\n            binding = 
db["bindings"].get(key_hash, {})\n            active = bool(binding.get("is_active"))\n            masked = 
f"{record.get(\'prefix\', \'DENG-????\')}...{record.get(\'suffix\', \'????\')}"\n            ciphertext = 
record.get("key_ciphertext") or ""\n            full_plain = lke.decrypt_license_key_ciphertext(ciphertext) if 
ciphertext else None\n            if active:\n                bound_device = binding.get("device_model") or 
"(unbound)"\n                last_seen = binding.get("last_seen_at")\n            else:\n                bound_device 
= "(unbound)"\n                last_seen = None\n            result.append({\n                "id": key_hash,\n        
        "masked_key": masked,\n                "full_key_plaintext": full_plain,\n                "status": 
record.get("status", "unknown"),\n                "plan": record.get("plan", "standard"),\n                
"bound_device": bound_device,\n                "last_seen_at": last_seen,\n                "created_at": 
record.get("created_at"),\n            })\n        return result\n\n    def list_user_keys_with_binding_state(\n       
 self, discord_user_id: str\n    ) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:\n        from . import license_key_export as lke\n\n       
 db = self._load()\n        result: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n        for key_hash, record in db["keys"].items():\n   
         if record.get("owner_discord_id") != discord_user_id:\n                continue\n            if 
record.get("status") == "revoked":\n                continue\n            binding = db.get("bindings", 
{}).get(key_hash, {})\n            active_binding = bool(binding.get("is_active"))\n            masked = 
f"{record.get(\'prefix\', \'DENG-????\')}...{record.get(\'suffix\', \'????\')}"\n            ciphertext = 
record.get("key_ciphertext") or ""\n            full_plain = lke.decrypt_license_key_ciphertext(ciphertext) if 
ciphertext else None\n            last_seen_at = binding.get("last_seen_at")\n            reset_count = 
self.get_reset_count_24h(key_hash)\n            # Determine can_reset and reason\n            reason: str | None = 
None\n            if not active_binding:\n                can_reset = False\n                reason = "No device bound 
ù start the tool first"\n            elif reset_count >= MAX_HWID_RESETS_PER_24H:\n                can_reset = False\n 
               reason = f"Reset limit reached ({reset_count}/{MAX_HWID_RESETS_PER_24H} today)"\n            else:\n    
            # Cooldown is based only on actual reset history, not on last_seen_at.\n                # First reset is 
always allowed immediately if no previous reset has occurred.\n                can_reset = True\n            
result.append({\n                "key_id": key_hash,\n                "masked_key": masked,\n                
"full_key_plaintext": full_plain,\n                "status": record.get("status", "unknown"),\n                
"active_binding": active_binding,\n                "device_model": binding.get("device_model", ""),\n                
"device_label": binding.get("device_label", ""),\n                "last_seen_at": last_seen_at,\n                
"reset_count_24h": reset_count,\n                "can_reset": can_reset,\n                "reason_if_not_resettable": 
reason,\n            })\n        return result\n\n    def list_user_keys_for_stats(self, discord_user_id: str) -> 
list[dict[str, Any]]:\n        from . import license_key_export as lke\n\n        db = self._load()\n        rows: 
list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n        exp_cfg = lke.is_export_secret_configured()\n        for key_hash, record in 
db["keys"].items():\n            if record.get("owner_discord_id") != discord_user_id:\n                continue\n     
       binding = db.get("bindings", {}).get(key_hash, {})\n            active_binding = 
bool(binding.get("is_active"))\n            masked = f"{record.get(\'prefix\', 
\'DENG-????\')}...{record.get(\'suffix\', \'????\')}"\n            lic_status = record.get("status", "active")\n       
     ciphertext = record.get("key_ciphertext") or ""\n            has_blob = bool(ciphertext)\n            full_plain 
= lke.decrypt_license_key_ciphertext(ciphertext) if has_blob else None\n            device = 
(binding.get("device_model") or binding.get("device_label") or "").strip() or None\n            reset_count = 
self.get_reset_count_24h(key_hash)\n            plan = record.get("plan", "standard") or "standard"\n            
rows.append({\n                "masked_key": masked,\n                "full_key_plaintext": full_plain,\n              
  "has_stored_ciphertext": has_blob,\n                "export_storage_configured": exp_cfg,\n                
"license_status": lic_status,\n                "used": active_binding,\n                "device_display": device,\n    
            "last_seen_at": binding.get("last_seen_at"),\n                "created_at": record.get("created_at"),\n    
            "plan": plan,\n                "reset_count_24h": reset_count,\n            })\n        
rows.sort(key=lambda r: str(r.get("created_at") or ""), reverse=True)\n        return rows\n\n    def 
recover_key_export_for_user(self, discord_user_id: str, raw_key: str) -> str:\n        from . import 
license_key_export as lke\n\n        if not lke.is_export_secret_configured():\n            raise 
ExportStorageUnavailable(\n                "Full key export storage is not enabled on this server."\n            )\n   
     try:\n            normalized = normalize_license_key(raw_key)\n        except LicenseKeyError as exc:\n           
 raise KeyNotFoundError(str(exc)) from exc\n        key_hash = hash_license_key(normalized)\n        db = 
self._load()\n        key_record = db["keys"].get(key_hash)\n        if not key_record:\n            raise 
KeyNotFoundError("Key not found. Check the key and try again.")\n        if key_record.get("owner_discord_id") != 
discord_user_id:\n            raise KeyOwnershipError("That key does not belong to your account.")\n        if 
key_record.get("status") == "revoked":\n            raise KeyNotFoundError("This key has been revoked.")\n\n        
existing_ct = (key_record.get("key_ciphertext") or "").strip()\n        if existing_ct:\n            if 
lke.decrypt_license_key_ciphertext(existing_ct):\n                return "already_exportable"\n\n        ciphertext = 
lke.encrypt_license_key_plaintext(normalized)\n        if not ciphertext:\n            raise 
ExportStorageUnavailable("Could not encrypt key for storage.")\n\n        key_record["key_ciphertext"] = ciphertext\n  
      key_record["key_export_available"] = True\n        key_record["updated_at"] = _utc_now()\n        
db["keys"][key_hash] = key_record\n        self._save(db)\n        self.audit_admin_action(\n            
discord_user_id,\n            "recover_key_export",\n            target_type="key",\n            
target_id=key_hash[:8],\n        )\n        return "stored"\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 HWID reset \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u
2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\
u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500
\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n    def 
reset_hwid(self, discord_user_id: str, key_id: str) -> None:\n        db = self._load()\n        key_record = 
db["keys"].get(key_id)\n        if not key_record:\n            raise KeyNotFoundError(f"Key not found: {key_id}")\n   
     if key_record.get("owner_discord_id") != discord_user_id:\n            raise KeyOwnershipError("You do not own 
this key.")\n        # Check for an active device binding FIRST.\n        # If none exists, return without logging a 
reset or consuming a reset slot.\n        existing_binding = db.get("bindings", {}).get(key_id)\n        if not 
existing_binding or not existing_binding.get("is_active"):\n            raise NoActiveBindingError(\n                
"No device is currently bound to this key. "\n                "Start the tool once to activate your device binding."\n 
           )\n        # Check reset count ù based only on actual HWID reset history, never on last_seen_at.\n        # 
A key used for license verification 1 minute ago must still be resettable on first attempt.\n        resets_24h = 
self.get_reset_count_24h(key_id)\n        if resets_24h >= MAX_HWID_RESETS_PER_24H:\n            raise 
ResetLimitError(\n                f"HWID reset limit reached ({MAX_HWID_RESETS_PER_24H} per 24 hours). "\n             
   "Please wait before trying again."\n            )\n        old_hash = existing_binding.get("install_id_hash")\n     
   # Deactivate binding\n        db["bindings"][key_id]["is_active"] = False\n        # Log the reset (only written 
when an actual binding is cleared)\n        db["reset_logs"].append({\n            "key_id": key_id,\n            
"owner_discord_id": discord_user_id,\n            "old_install_id_hash": old_hash,\n            "reason": 
"user_requested",\n            "created_at": _utc_now(),\n        })\n        self._save(db)\n        
self.audit_admin_action(\n            discord_user_id, "reset_hwid",\n            target_type="key", 
target_id=key_id[:8],\n            metadata={"old_install_id_hash": (old_hash or "")[:8]},\n        )\n\n    def 
get_reset_count_24h(self, key_id: str) -> int:\n        db = self._load()\n        cutoff = time.time() - 86400\n      
  count = 0\n        for entry in db.get("reset_logs", []):\n            if entry.get("key_id") != key_id:\n           
     continue\n            elapsed = _seconds_since(entry.get("created_at"))\n            if elapsed is not None and 
elapsed <= 86400:\n                count += 1\n        return count\n\n    def get_last_seen_at(self, key_id: str) -> 
str | None:\n        db = self._load()\n        return db.get("bindings", {}).get(key_id, {}).get("last_seen_at")\n\n  
  # \u2500\u2500 Device binding \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2
500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u
2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\
u2500\u2500\n\n    def bind_or_check_device(\n        self,\n        raw_key: str,\n        install_id_hash: str,\n    
    device_model: str,\n        app_version: str,\n        device_label: str = "",\n    ) -> str:\n        lbl = 
(device_label or "").strip()[:80]\n        try:\n            normalized = normalize_license_key(raw_key)\n        
except LicenseKeyError:\n            return RESULT_NOT_FOUND\n        key_hash = hash_license_key(normalized)\n        
db = self._load()\n        record = db["keys"].get(key_hash)\n        if not record:\n            
self.log_license_check(\n                key_id=None, install_id_hash=install_id_hash,\n                
result=RESULT_NOT_FOUND, device_model=device_model, app_version=app_version,\n            )\n            return 
RESULT_NOT_FOUND\n        if record.get("status") == "revoked":\n            self.log_license_check(\n                
key_id=key_hash, install_id_hash=install_id_hash,\n                result=RESULT_REVOKED, device_model=device_model, 
app_version=app_version,\n            )\n            return RESULT_REVOKED\n        expires = 
record.get("expires_at")\n        if expires:\n            try:\n                exp_dt = 
datetime.fromisoformat(expires)\n                if datetime.now(timezone.utc) > exp_dt:\n                    
self.log_license_check(\n                        key_id=key_hash, install_id_hash=install_id_hash,\n                   
     result=RESULT_EXPIRED, device_model=device_model, app_version=app_version,\n                    )\n               
     return RESULT_EXPIRED\n            except (ValueError, TypeError):\n                pass\n        owner_id = 
record.get("owner_discord_id")\n        if owner_id is None or str(owner_id).strip() == "":\n            
self.log_license_check(\n                key_id=key_hash,\n                install_id_hash=install_id_hash,\n          
      result=RESULT_KEY_NOT_REDEEMED,\n                device_model=device_model,\n                
app_version=app_version,\n            )\n            return RESULT_KEY_NOT_REDEEMED\n        # Check device binding\n  
      binding = db.get("bindings", {}).get(key_hash)\n        if binding and binding.get("is_active"):\n            
bound_hash = binding.get("install_id_hash")\n            if bound_hash and bound_hash != install_id_hash:\n            
    self.log_license_check(\n                    key_id=key_hash, install_id_hash=install_id_hash,\n                   
 result=RESULT_WRONG_DEVICE, device_model=device_model, app_version=app_version,\n                )\n                
return RESULT_WRONG_DEVICE\n            # Same device ù update heartbeat + device info\n            now_ts = 
_utc_now()\n            db["bindings"][key_hash]["last_seen_at"] = now_ts\n            
db["bindings"][key_hash]["last_status"] = RESULT_ACTIVE\n            db["bindings"][key_hash]["device_model"] = 
(device_model or "")[:120] or binding.get("device_model", "")\n            db["bindings"][key_hash]["device_label"] = 
lbl\n        else:\n            # New binding ù also mark the key as redeemed (first activation)\n            now_ts = 
_utc_now()\n            db.setdefault("bindings", {})[key_hash] = {\n                "install_id_hash": 
install_id_hash,\n                "device_label": lbl,\n                "device_model": (device_model or "")[:120],\n  
              "bound_at": now_ts,\n                "last_seen_at": now_ts,\n                "last_status": 
RESULT_ACTIVE,\n                "is_active": True,\n            }\n            if not record.get("redeemed_at"):\n     
           db["keys"][key_hash]["redeemed_at"] = now_ts\n                db["keys"][key_hash]["updated_at"] = now_ts\n 
       self._save(db)\n        self.log_license_check(\n            key_id=key_hash, 
install_id_hash=install_id_hash,\n            result=RESULT_ACTIVE, device_model=device_model, 
app_version=app_version,\n        )\n        return RESULT_ACTIVE\n\n    def check_install_download_access(self, 
raw_key: str, install_id_hash: str) -> str:\n        try:\n            normalized = normalize_license_key(raw_key)\n   
     except LicenseKeyError:\n            return RESULT_NOT_FOUND\n        key_hash = hash_license_key(normalized)\n   
     db = self._load()\n        record = db["keys"].get(key_hash)\n        if not record:\n            
self.log_license_check(\n                key_id=None,\n                install_id_hash=install_id_hash,\n              
  result=RESULT_NOT_FOUND,\n                device_model="bootstrap",\n                app_version="install",\n        
    )\n            return RESULT_NOT_FOUND\n        if record.get("status") == "revoked":\n            
self.log_license_check(\n                key_id=key_hash,\n                install_id_hash=install_id_hash,\n          
      result=RESULT_REVOKED,\n                device_model="bootstrap",\n                app_version="install",\n      
      )\n            return RESULT_REVOKED\n        expires = record.get("expires_at")\n        if expires:\n          
  try:\n                exp_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(expires)\n                if datetime.now(timezone.utc) > 
exp_dt:\n                    self.log_license_check(\n                        key_id=key_hash,\n                       
 install_id_hash=install_id_hash,\n                        result=RESULT_EXPIRED,\n                        
device_model="bootstrap",\n                        app_version="install",\n                    )\n                    
return RESULT_EXPIRED\n            except (ValueError, TypeError):\n                pass\n        owner_id = 
record.get("owner_discord_id")\n        if owner_id is None or str(owner_id).strip() == "":\n            
self.log_license_check(\n                key_id=key_hash,\n                install_id_hash=install_id_hash,\n          
      result=RESULT_KEY_NOT_REDEEMED,\n                device_model="bootstrap",\n                
app_version="install",\n            )\n            return RESULT_KEY_NOT_REDEEMED\n        binding = 
db.get("bindings", {}).get(key_hash)\n        if binding and binding.get("is_active"):\n            bound_hash = 
binding.get("install_id_hash")\n            if not install_id_hash.strip():\n                self.log_license_check(\n 
                   key_id=key_hash,\n                    install_id_hash=install_id_hash,\n                    
result=RESULT_WRONG_DEVICE,\n                    device_model="bootstrap",\n                    
app_version="install",\n                )\n                return RESULT_WRONG_DEVICE\n            if bound_hash and 
bound_hash != install_id_hash:\n                self.log_license_check(\n                    key_id=key_hash,\n        
            install_id_hash=install_id_hash,\n                    result=RESULT_WRONG_DEVICE,\n                    
device_model="bootstrap",\n                    app_version="install",\n                )\n                return 
RESULT_WRONG_DEVICE\n        self.log_license_check(\n            key_id=key_hash,\n            
install_id_hash=install_id_hash,\n            result=RESULT_ACTIVE,\n            device_model="bootstrap",\n           
 app_version="install",\n        )\n        return RESULT_ACTIVE\n\n    def get_owner_discord_id_for_license_key(self, 
raw_key: str) -> str | None:\n        try:\n            normalized = normalize_license_key(raw_key)\n        except 
LicenseKeyError:\n            return None\n        key_hash = hash_license_key(normalized)\n        db = 
self._load()\n        record = db["keys"].get(key_hash)\n        if not record:\n            return None\n        
owner_id = record.get("owner_discord_id")\n        if owner_id is None or str(owner_id).strip() == "":\n            
return None\n        return str(owner_id).strip()\n\n    def log_license_check(self, **kwargs: Any) -> None:\n        
db = self._load()\n        entry = {\n            "key_id": kwargs.get("key_id"),\n            "install_id_hash": 
kwargs.get("install_id_hash"),\n            "result": kwargs.get("result", "unknown"),\n            "device_model": 
kwargs.get("device_model", ""),\n            "app_version": kwargs.get("app_version", ""),\n            "created_at": 
_utc_now(),\n        }\n        db.setdefault("check_logs", []).append(entry)\n        # Keep last 1000 check log 
entries to avoid unbounded growth\n        db["check_logs"] = db["check_logs"][-1000:]\n        self._save(db)\n\n    
# \u2500\u2500 Panel config \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\

\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u250

           "channel_id": channel_id,\n            "message_id": message_id,\n            "updated_by": updated_by,\n   
         "updated_at": _utc_now(),\n        }\n        self._save(db)\n\n    def get_panel_config(self, guild_id: str)

\u2500\u2500 Audit log \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500
\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u250

00\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n    def audit_admin_action(\n        self,\n        actor_discord_user_id: str,\n  
      action: str,\n        *,\n        target_type: str | None = None,\n        target_id: str | None = None,\n       
 metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        db = self._load()\n        
db.setdefault("audit_logs", []).append({\n            "actor_discord_id": actor_discord_user_id,\n            
"action": action,\n            "target_type": target_type,\n            "target_id": target_id,\n            
"metadata": metadata or {},\n            "created_at": _utc_now(),\n        })\n        # Keep last 5000 audit 
entries\n        db["audit_logs"] = db["audit_logs"][-5000:]\n        self._save(db)\n\n    # \u2500\u2500 License log 
channel config \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u
2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\
