_probe_logcat_broken(package: str, pid: Optional[str] = None) -> Optional[ExperienceEvidence]:\n    """BROKEN: logcat 
probe. Archived for historical reference.\n\n    Issues:\n    - App Cloner packages have truncated process names; 
pidof returns wrong PIDs.\n    - Logcat output is device-dependent; patterns miss many Roblox client versions.\n    - 
Called from live Start in old versions, causing false Joining loop.\n    """\n    raise RuntimeError(\n        "BROKEN 
LEGACY CODE: _probe_logcat_broken must not be called from live Start."\n    )\n\n\ndef 
_probe_dumpsys_activity_broken(package: str) -> Optional[ExperienceEvidence]:\n    """BROKEN: dumpsys activity probe. 
Archived for historical reference.\n\n    Issues:\n    - Activity class names vary across Roblox versions and clone 
apps.\n    - Produced false ROBLOX_HOME_OR_LOBBY evidence after URL launch.\n    - When combined with Join Unconfirmed 
logic, caused 120s URL resend loop.\n    """\n    raise RuntimeError(\n        "BROKEN LEGACY CODE: 
_probe_dumpsys_activity_broken must not be called from live Start."\n    )\n\n\ndef _probe_uiautomator_broken(package: 
str) -> Optional[ExperienceEvidence]:\n    """BROKEN: uiautomator probe. Archived for historical reference.\n\n    
Issues:\n    - `uiautomator dump` triggers Android Accessibility Service callback.\n    - On Termux with App Cloner 
packages, this causes SIGSEGV in Python.\n    - SIGSEGV is a hard C-level segfault; faulthandler cannot intercept it 
cleanly.\n    - Removed in probe p-f1a4aaafe5.\n    """\n    raise RuntimeError(\n        "BROKEN LEGACY CODE: 
_probe_uiautomator_broken must not be called from live Start."\n    )\n\n\ndef detect_experience_state_broken(\n    
package: str,\n    *,\n    url_launched: bool = False,\n) -> ExperienceEvidence:\n    """BROKEN: Old main API. 
Archived for historical reference.\n\n    The old supervisor called this after every URL launch to check if the\n    
account was "in-game" or "at lobby." When detection was inconclusive\n    (which it always was for App Cloner 
packages), the package would be stuck\n    in Join Unconfirmed state and the URL would be resent every 120 
seconds.\n\n    Replaced by: Roblox Presence API + process-alive check.\n    """\n    raise RuntimeError(\n        
"BROKEN LEGACY CODE: detect_experience_state_broken must not be called from live Start."\n    )\n\n# BROKEN LEGACY 
CODE ù DO NOT USE IN LIVE START PATH.\n#\n# Archived after live probes p-f1a4aaafe5 / p-8b025e8c3c because this 
smart\n# Android/UI detection caused SIGSEGV, false Joining/Join Unconfirmed states,\n# private URL relaunch failures, 
and endless restart loops.\n#\n# This code is kept only for historical reference.\n# Live Start must not import or 
call this module.\n# Future real state detection must use Roblox Presence API, not\n# uiautomator/logcat/UI 
dump.\n#\n"""Archived: Old Joining / Join Unconfirmed / In Server / Lobby state machine.\n\nThis file documents the 
state constants and logic that caused endless\nJoining loops and URL resend storms.  None of this runs in the live 
Start path.\n\nTHE OLD BROKEN FLOW (what used to happen):\n==========================================\n\n1. User 
pressed Start.\n2. Tool sent private_server_url to each Roblox package via `am start`.\n3. Package was marked 
STATUS_JOINING ("Joining" in public table).\n4. Supervisor called detect_experience_state() every health check 
cycle.\n5. detect_experience_state() used dumpsys/logcat/uiautomator.\n6. These probes often returned 
ROBLOX_HOME_OR_LOBBY (false positive lobby).\n7. Supervisor set STATUS_JOIN_UNCONFIRMED ("Join Unconfirmed").\n8. 
After 120 seconds in Join Unconfirmed, supervisor resent the private URL.\n9. The URL resend marked the package 
STATUS_JOINING again.\n10. Goto step 4. \u2192 Infinite loop.\n\nWHY IT FAILED:\n==============\n- App Cloner packages 
have truncated process names, breaking pidof/logcat --pid.\n- dumpsys activity class names vary across Roblox app 
versions and clone APKs.\n- uiautomator dump crashes with SIGSEGV on Termux/App Cloner (Accessibility Service).\n- The 
account could actually be playing (visible in Roblox Presence API as InGame)\n  while all local probes returned 
"lobby" ù the tool kept resending the URL\n  and interrupting the active game session.\n\nTHE FIX 
(Kaeru-style):\n======================\n- After URL launch, if process is alive \u2192 STATUS_ONLINE ("Online").\n- No 
Joining state, no Join Unconfirmed state, no URL resend loop.\n- Roblox Presence API is used as a safe CONFIRMATION 
layer:\n  * If InGame \u2192 Online (confirmed).\n  * If not in game \u2192 don\'t resend; just note it internally.\n  
* Process dead \u2192 relaunch (regardless of Presence API).\n"""\n\n# \u2500\u2500\u2500 BROKEN state constants 
(archived ù do not use in live Start) 
\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n# These constants were set by the 
old supervisor on URL launch.\n# They are kept here for documentation only.  The live supervisor\n# maps them to 
STATUS_ONLINE or STATUS_LAUNCHING for public display.\n\nSTATUS_JOINING_BROKEN = "Joining"\n# Set when `am start 
<private_server_url>` was sent.\n# The old supervisor waited for detect_experience_state() to confirm in-game.\n# 
Without confirmation, it fell into STATUS_JOIN_UNCONFIRMED after grace period.\n\nSTATUS_JOIN_UNCONFIRMED_BROKEN = 
"Join Unconfirmed"\n# Set when: URL was sent, process is alive, but no in-game evidence detected.\n# OLD BEHAVIOR: 
after _JOIN_UNCONFIRMED_RELAUNCH_SECONDS (120s), resend URL.\n# PROBLEM: caused infinite URL resend loop on every 
launch.\n\nSTATUS_IN_SERVER_BROKEN = "In Server"\n# Set when detect_experience_state() returned 
EXPERIENCE_LIKELY_LOADED.\n# PROBLEM: required uiautomator (SIGSEGV) or logcat (unreliable for clones).\n# Almost 
never reached correctly.\n\nSTATUS_LOBBY_BROKEN = "Lobby"\n# Set when detect_experience_state() returned 
ROBLOX_HOME_OR_LOBBY.\n# PROBLEM: frequently triggered false positives \u2192 led to STATUS_JOIN_UNCONFIRMED.\n\n# 
\u2500\u2500\u2500 BROKEN 120-second resend timeout \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\
u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500
\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n_JOIN_UNCONFIRMED_RELAUNCH_SECONDS_BROKEN = 120\n# 
After 120 seconds in Join Unconfirmed, the old supervisor resent the URL.\n# This was the root cause of the endless 
relaunch loop.\n#\n# Changed to 3600 (1 hour, effectively disabled) in probe p-f1a4aaafe5.\n# Now dead code ù 
_post_launch_state() returns STATUS_ONLINE immediately.\n\n# \u2500\u2500\u2500 BROKEN presence.is_lobby branch (from 
old supervisor.py) 
\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n#\n# The old 
presence detection in supervisor.py (before stable rebuild):\n#\n#     if presence.is_lobby:\n#         if (\n#        
     self.launching_since is not None\n#             and self.has_private_url\n#             and prev_before_check in 
(\n#                 STATUS_LAUNCHING, STATUS_JOINING, STATUS_LAUNCHED,\n#             )\n#         ):\n#             
# URL was sent and Roblox says the account is in the app lobby.\n#             # The old code called this "Joining", 
not "Online".\n#             self._set_status(STATUS_JOINING, "Roblox presence: Online (lobby)")\n#         else:\n#   
          self._set_status(STATUS_LOBBY, "Roblox presence: Online (lobby)")\n#         self._last_presence_label = 
presence.presence_type.label\n#         self.last_seen_at = time.time()\n#         self._sleep(interval)\n#         
continue\n#\n# PROBLEM: This path set STATUS_JOINING when the account was at the lobby,\n# which was almost always the

based on lobby detection.  The process-alive check\n# below determines the public Online/Reopening/Failed state.\n\n#

supervisor.py) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u
2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n#\n# The original _post_launch_state method (before Kaeru-style fix in 
p-f1a4aaafe5):\n#\n#     def _post_launch_state(self) -> str:\n#         """Detect experience state after a URL

STATUS_JOIN_UNCONFIRMED\n#\n# PROBLEM: This returned STATUS_JOIN_UNCONFIRMED on almost every launch\n# because 
detect_experience_state() relied on uiautomator (SIGSEGV) and\n# logcat (unreliable for App Cloner), which almost 
always returned weak evidence.\n# STATUS_JOIN_UNCONFIRMED then triggered the 120-second URL resend loop.\n#\n# FIX: 
_post_launch_state() now returns STATUS_ONLINE immediately.\n# Process alive = Online.  No Android UI probing needed 
or used.\n# See agent/supervisor.py for current implementation.\n\n# \u2500\u2500\u2500 BROKEN initial_status in 
cmd_start (before URL canonicalization) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n#\n# Old cmd_start 
code:\n#\n#     if android.is_process_running(pkg):\n#         state = "In Server"  # assumed in-game if process 
running after URL\n#     else:\n#         state = "Joining"    # assumed joining if process not detected yet\n#\n# 
PROBLEM: "In Server" was incorrect ù the process was just launched and\n# barely started.  "Joining" triggered the 
supervisor\'s Join Unconfirmed timer.\n#\n# FIX: cmd_start now sets initial state based on URL awareness:\n#   - URL 
configured + process running \u2192 "Joining" (immediately resolves to Online)\n#   - URL configured, process not yet 
visible \u2192 "Joining" (resolves to Online fast)\n#   - No URL \u2192 "Launched" or "Launching"\n# And the 
_STATE_DISPLAY_MAP in commands.py maps all these to public states.\n\n# \u2500\u2500\u2500 BANNED probes in live Start 
\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u250
0\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u25
00\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n#\n# The following Android probes are BANNED from live Start and supervisor 
paths:\n#\n#   uiautomator dump     ù SIGSEGV on Termux/App Cloner\n#   logcat -d            ù unreliable for clone 
package PIDs\n#   dumpsys activity     ù false lobby detections cause Joining loop\n#   accessibility dump   ù 
triggers uiautomator SIGSEGV\n#   OCR / screen text    ù requires accessibility or screenshot\n#\n# The live Start 
path uses ONLY:\n#   pidof / am (process alive)     ù via android.is_process_running()\n#   check_package_health()     
    ù via monitor.py\n#   Roblox Presence API            ù via agent/roblox_presence.py\n#\n# No subprocess call 
inside the supervisor worker may call uiautomator,\n# logcat, or dumpsys activity. All subprocess calls go through 
the\n# global subprocess lock in android.py.\n\n# \u2500\u2500\u2500 BROKEN detect_experience_state import (old 
supervisor.py line 13) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n#\n# Old import that was at the top of 
agent/supervisor.py:\n#\n#     from .experience_detector import EvidenceLevel, detect_experience_state\n#\n# This 
import meant that even if detect_experience_state was never called,\n# the experience_detector module was loaded at 
import time.  This was harmless\n# (no Android probes run at import), but the dead import was confusing.\n#\n# FIX:
